image.title: NAA Yilmaz, E Marklund, M Andersson, S Nilsson, LM Andersson, M Lindh, M Gisslén

item.title: Upper respiratory tract levels of SARS-CoV-2 RNA and duration of viral RNA shedding do not differ between patients with mild and severe/critical COVID-19.
